title: The Montauk Project
author: Preston Nichols
content: The theory alleges secret psychological warfare and time-travel experiments were conducted at a military base in Long Island.
action: Secluded facilities offer perfect cover for fringe research.

title: The Paul is Dead Theory
author: The Beatles fan rumors
content: The theory claims Paul McCartney died in 1966 and was replaced by a look-alike to spare The Beatles' career.
action: Public icons are essentially products that brands must preserve.

title: The Bohemian Grove
author: Alex Jones
content: The theory suggests that an elite, secret society gathers in a California forest to conduct occult rituals and manipulate world affairs.
action: Private, exclusionary spaces inherently fuel suspicion of power.

title: The Targeted Individual Phenomenon
author: Online communities
content: The theory claims that specific citizens are systematically surveilled and harassed by government actors using remote technology.
action: Mass surveillance capabilities make personal tracking technically feasible.

title: The Lost Cosmonauts
author: Various investigators
content: The theory claims the Soviet Union launched secret, failed space missions that resulted in deaths hidden from public records.
action: States frequently erase failures to project absolute strength.
